note: Remote op-dropdown flash/auto-close on ~1s models:checked storm. Defect B confirmed (MpiPromptBox _refreshOpDropdown rebuilds unconditionally on models:checked, blows away open dropdown; Model Library already guards this). Defect A hypothesis (remote:connection connected-edge flapping while Pod inits -> syncModelInstalled re-fires; shell.js:1368 has no debounce). Splitting diagnostic + release-safe fix (guard the rebuild) in card. Scope 1.2-vs-1.3 pending user.

ESCALATED: storm also corrupts active slider input (Denoise thumb snaps back ~1x/s mid-drag; control remounts to state value). Per-widget guards insufficient. Revised primary fix = gate models:checked emit (modelRegistry.js:218) on a real diff of installedModelIds+driftedModelIds so steady-state re-syncs go silent - fixes dropdown+slider+ModelLibrary+heroStats at once. Severity now leans 1.2-blocker; user still deciding at close.

Diagnostic RESOLVED: storm PERSISTS at full idle (Pod IDLE/REMOTE, 9 assets done). POST /wrapper/models/status every ~2-3s + /wrapper/stats ~1/s; renderer showed ~8961 total requests + a 2nd comfyController.js poll. Steady-state, not connect-flap. User confirms controls unusable on remote (dropdown wont stay open, slider snaps + stops dragging). Severity: 1.2-blocker candidate. Source poll still unpinned - do the free Network filter=check probe before deleting the warm Pod.

New lead: the first connect this session was botched (user switched tabs mid-connect, Connecting state got stuck/ambiguous, came back connected). Hypothesis: a messy connect double-registered a poller or leaked a listener -> duplicate steady-state polling loop. TEST PENDING: full app restart (not reload) + clean reconnect to the same warm Pod, then check if the storm reproduces at idle. Gone -> first-connect artifact (narrower). Still there -> genuine steady-state design bug. After repro, read app.log filtered by category to pin the polling service/timer.

DECISIVE ISOLATION: deleting the Pod / running local -> storm gone, controls normal. So the re-render storm is 100% REMOTE-poll-driven, NOT a general local regression. Confirms Defect A lives in the remote polling layer (how a steady-state /wrapper poll drives renderer re-renders while connected). Root-cause subagent tracing the exact poller + chain + fix surface offline.

ROOT CAUSE VERIFIED (root-cause trace + hand-confirmed every hop). shell.js _initRemoteStatusFeed re-emits remote:connection {connected:true} every 5s (HEALTHY_MS) for the live cost badge; the shell.js:1368 sync listener has no edge guard so it re-syncs every 5s -> models:checked storm -> dropdown tear-down (1657/1209) + slider DOM rebuild via setModelList/_refreshOpSlot (1341->1653->1687->649->1228). FIX mapped, release-safe, ship both: A) edge-guard the sync at shell.js:1370 (if connected AND NOT _wasRemoteConnected); B) diff-gate the models:checked emit at modelRegistry.js:218. Consumer sweeps + MPI-200 safety documented on the card. Awaiting user go on 1.2-blocker scope + implement (shared machinery, brief-first).
